title: Career Support & CV Help
summary: Practical career support, CV help, and next-step guidance that turn uncertainty into something clearer and more usable.
promise: Help people make progress with CVs, applications, confidence, and practical next steps they can use straight away.
audienceSummary: Best for young people who want practical help with CVs, applications, work or college next steps, and confidence around getting started.
audienceHighlights: Young people who need help turning a blank or unfinished CV into something usable
People preparing for work, college, applications, or the next practical step
Parents, carers, or referrers who need a clear live route rather than vague employability language
deliverySummary: The current live route is the recurring Saturday CV support session. This programme page explains the broader practical-support promise, while the session page owns exact timing, calendar access, and attendance detail.
trustNotes: The route feels useful from the first question, even if someone arrives unsure or underprepared.
Privacy matters because CVs, applications, and confidence worries can feel personal.
The live route is local and practical: Rochdale can stay public while exact venue detail is shared on enquiry.
outcomeBullets: Help with applications and next steps
Confidence in work-readiness and opportunity conversations

bodySections.heading: What this route covers
body: The confirmed public offer covers CV writing, job applications, practical next steps, and support that helps someone feel more ready for work or college opportunities.
The PDF brief also places CV writing and employment support inside the organisation's wider promise to build confidence, practical skills, and positive life outcomes.

bodySections.heading: How support here feels
body: Career support feels practical, calm, and confidence-building rather than like someone has to perform expertise before they can ask for help.
The route makes room for questions, unfinished drafts, and uncertainty while still helping someone leave with a clearer idea of what to do next.
bullets: Guidance that connects to real next steps

bodySections.heading: How the live route works right now
body: The clearest current live expression of this programme is the recurring Saturday CV support session.

That session page owns the exact recurrence, calendar entry, and what to bring. This programme page explains the wider practical-support promise so the route stays useful even before someone clicks into the timetable.
bullets: Linked to the Saturday CV support session
Session page owns exact timing and calendar detail
Contact stays visible for people who need guidance first

seoDescription: Get practical career support and CV help through EncouragingYou's Rochdale-based support offer and recurring Saturday session.
